tool_args.label: Approval of 2025 Committee Work Plan - January 2025

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2025 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2025 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Winter of 2025.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Winter of 2025.

payload.description: A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.

payload.description: The Agency will present its revised 2025 Financial Plan reflecting the 2024 Adopted Budget.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Agency will present its revised 2025 Financial Plan. These plans will reflect the 2024 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2024 reflecting the out-year impact of any changes incorporated into the 2024 Adopted Budget.

payload.description: Annual report to the Committee on system-wide availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Annual report to the Committee on system-wide availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Spring of 2025.

payload.description: A report will be presented to the Committee on Agency ridership trends during 2024 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by the Agency.

payload.description: Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.
